svg.title: Photo review screen wireframe in browse and crop modes
svg.desc: Two stacked window wireframes. The top shows browsing: status bar with counter and keep badge, large image area, filmstrip with keep, reject, and current markers, and a keyboard hint bar. The bottom shows crop mode with a 16:9 crop rectangle, rule of thirds guides, and handles. A bidirectional arrow labeled C and enter or esc connects them.
svg.text: ← → move · K keep · X reject · C crop · Z zoom · F filter · ⌘Z undo
1–5 aspect · arrows move · ⇧ arrows resize · ⏎ apply · esc cancel · R reset
